description_long: This house features a cubic, fortress-like structure with a flat roof bordered by evenly spaced vertical posts topped with red caps. A prominent glass dome sits centrally on the roof, suggesting a skylight or observatory feature. The main entryway is an arched black door set into a plain, light gray facade, accessible via a staircase on the right side. The building is constructed primarily from concrete or stone, giving it a modern, minimalist appearance. The roof is accessible by stairs, and the posts create a parapet effect around the perimeter. There are no visible windows on the exterior walls, emphasizing privacy and a monolithic aesthetic.
description: A modern, cubic house with a flat roof, glass dome skylight, and parapet posts, featuring a single arched entryway and rooftop access via stairs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched entryway, rooftop dome, and stairs leading up the right side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the building's depth, the glass dome, and the parapet posts along the roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid wall with no windows, the glass dome, and the full length of the rooftop parapet.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plain wall, parapet posts, and partial view of the entry arch.
attribute_entryway_design: Arched black door with steps, no porch or decorative elements
